purpose: Prevent observation, persistence, replay, or documentation from being silently promoted into truth, causation, guilt, or authority.

invariants.rule: No truth claim may be inferred from observation alone.
No causation claim may be inferred without explicit supporting evidence.
No guilt, intent, or legal conclusion may be inferred by replay status.
Replay verification is not truth verification.
No silent promotion from record, receipt, or artifact to claim.

notes: Restored because deployment/stack-hash-rule-v1.json lists this path as a required stack hash input.
This artifact does not alter renderer production assets.
This artifact preserves authority=false and resolution_semantics=absent.
